ratings.comment: Hands down the best professor I've ever had. She is really passionate, which made her lectures super engaging. This was the only class I've ever not skipped once. The grading was very fair, and there was a lot of reading, but if you fall behind just go to lecture and you'll be fine. I would go out of my way to take her class again.
She is an amazing instructor and an incredibly good person. I would go out of my way to take another class with her.
